sentences.arabic: فِي رَأْيِي، السَّفَرُ يُعَلِّمُنَا أَشْيَاءَ كَثِيرَةً.
sentences.translation: Po mom mišljenju, putovanje nas uči mnogo toga.
sentences.translationEn: In my opinion, travelling teaches us many things.

sentences.arabic: حِينَ تُسَافِرُ تَرَى طَرِيقَةَ حَيَاةٍ مُخْتَلِفَةً.
sentences.translation: Kada putuješ, vidiš drugačiji način života.
sentences.translationEn: When you travel you see a different way of life.

sentences.arabic: تَتَعَلَّمُ أَيْضًا كَيْفَ تَتَعَامَلُ مَعَ النَّاسِ الْجُدُدِ.
sentences.translation: Naučiš i kako se ophoditi prema novim ljudima.
sentences.translationEn: You also learn how to deal with new people.

sentences.arabic: أَحَاوِلُ أَنْ أُسَافِرَ إِلَى مَكَانٍ جَدِيدٍ كُلَّ سَنَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Trudim se svake godine putovati na novo mjesto.
sentences.translationEn: I try to travel to a new place every year.
